subcodes.first_line: The Primal Point saith: Should a soul appear and reveal a single verse, reject him not [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نقطه اولی میفرماید اگر نفسی ظاهر شود و یک آیه بیاورد تکذیب مکنید حال معادل
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @praise and encouragement, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @proclamation to people of the Bayan
